title: Rocky Road: The Bumpy Ice Cream Adventure
story: Every June 2, ice cream lovers celebrate National Rocky Road Day by scooping up this chunky, chocolatey treat! Rocky road ice cream is packed with chocolate, marshmallows, and nuts that create a "bumpy road" of flavors in every bite. Ice cream shops offer special rocky road flavors, families make homemade versions, and social media fills with photos of towering sundaes. Some people host rocky road taste tests, comparing different brands or trying creative twists like rocky road cookies or brownies. The holiday proves that sometimes the bumpiest roads lead to the sweetest destinations!
activity_question: What three main ingredients make rocky road ice cream "bumpy"?
bonus_fact: Rocky road was invented during the Great Depression to give people hope during tough times!
